items.name: moai-adk
items.description: SPEC-First Agentic Development Kit for Claude Code — 24 AI agents + 52 skills with TDD/DDD quality gates, 16-language projects, 4-language docs. Go CLI, zero deps.

items.name: wayland
items.description: Wayland - The AI Agent That Perceives. Reasons. Acts. Evolves.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: agent-messenger
items.description: Messenger automation CLI & SDK for AI agents

items.name: cli
items.description: Official Model Studio CLI（阿里云百炼 CLI）built for AI Agent frameworks, exposing models, search, multimodal, and workflow capabilities as structured tool calls.

items.name: loopx
items.description: Lightweight loop engineering state kernel for long-running AI agent teams. Agent-loop agnostic across Codex, Claude Code, and other coding agents, with durable goals, quota-aware auto-wake, executable todos, evidence logs, and verifiable handoffs.

items.name: jiuwenswarm
items.description: JiuwenSwarm is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.

items.name: prism-coder
items.description: Persistent memory + local AI for coding agents. 2B–27B open-weight LLM fleet, cross-session Mind Palace, cognitive routing, L3 grounding verifier, multi-agent Hivemind. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code. Offline-first, HIPAA-ready. Free tier included.

items.name: OpenMAIC
items.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click

items.name: nodedb
items.description: The memory & storage engine for AI agents. Multi-model, edge-to-cloud, PostgreSQL-compatible.

items.name: pipelock
items.description: Open-source AI agent firewall for MCP security and agent egress. Scans mediated HTTP, MCP, A2A, and WebSocket traffic for exfiltration, SSRF, and prompt injection, and emits mediator-signed action receipts: verifiable audit evidence from outside the agent.
